message:
Last winter, we got hit with a surprise snowstorm. I remember the kids were initially bummed about being stuck inside, but then I suggested a game of charades. To my delight, we ended up laughing so hard we almost forgot about the snow piling up outside! It was a great reminder that sometimes, the best fun can come from low-tech activities. 🌨️

We also took some time to talk about what we might need if the power went out for a while. It felt good to prep without feeling overwhelmed. If you’re looking for some ideas to keep the family entertained while staying ready, this little refresher helped! What’s your go-to indoor activity during a storm?
